name: Harness CI
# push to main, all PRs (with path filters), manual dispatch
on:
  push:
    branches: [main]
  pull_request:
    paths:
      - '**/*.rs'
      - '**/Cargo.toml'
      - '**/Cargo.lock'
      - '.github/workflows/**'
  workflow_dispatch:

concurrency:
  group: ${{ github.workflow }}-${{ github.ref }}
  cancel-in-progress: true

jobs:
  harness:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.SUBMODULE_PAT || github.token }}

      - name: Checkout submodules with remotes
        env:
          SUBMODULE_PAT: ${{ secrets.SUBMODULE_PAT }}
        run: |
          if [ -n "$SUBMODULE_PAT" ]; then
            git config --global url."https://x-access-token:${SUBMODULE_PAT}@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/"
          fi
          git submodule sync --recursive
          git submodule update --init --depth 1 aiOS arcan lago autonomic spaces praxis vigil nous anima haima

      - name: Install protoc
        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y protobuf-compiler lld

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          toolchain: stable
          components: clippy, rustfmt

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
        with:
          workspaces: |
            aiOS -> .target
            arcan -> .target
            lago -> .target
            autonomic -> .target
            praxis -> .target
            vigil -> .target
            nous -> .target
            anima -> .target
            haima -> .target

      - name: Run harness pipeline (smoke -> check -> test)
        run: make ci

  control-audit:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    needs: harness
    if: always()
    steps:
      - uses: actions/checkout@v4
        with:
          token: ${{ secrets.SUBMODULE_PAT || github.token }}

      - name: Checkout submodules with remotes
        env:
          SUBMODULE_PAT: ${{ secrets.SUBMODULE_PAT }}
        run: |
          if [ -n "$SUBMODULE_PAT" ]; then
            git config --global url."https://x-access-token:${SUBMODULE_PAT}@github.com/".insteadOf "https://github.com/"
          fi
          git submodule sync --recursive
          git submodule update --init --depth 1 aiOS arcan lago autonomic spaces praxis vigil nous anima haima

      - name: Install protoc
        run: sudo apt-get update && sudo apt-get install -y protobuf-compiler lld

      - uses: dtolnay/rust-toolchain@stable
        with:
          toolchain: stable
          components: clippy, rustfmt

      - uses: Swatinem/rust-cache@v2
        with:
          workspaces: |
            aiOS -> .target
            arcan -> .target
            lago -> .target
            autonomic -> .target
            praxis -> .target
            vigil -> .target
            nous -> .target
            anima -> .target
            haima -> .target

      - name: Run control audit
        run: make control-audit || echo "::warning::Control audit failed (docs submodule may not be available in CI)"

      - name: Capture control state
        if: always()
        run: |
          echo "## Control Harness Results" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "| Gate | Status |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          echo "|------|--------|" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          make -f Makefile.control smoke 2>&1 && echo "| smoke | PASS |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || echo "| smoke | FAIL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          make -f Makefile.control check 2>&1 && echo "| check | PASS |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || echo "| check | FAIL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY
          make -f Makefile.control test 2>&1 && echo "| test | PASS |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY || echo "| test | FAIL |" >> $GITHUB_STEP_SUMMARY

      - name: Upload control artifacts
        if: always()
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: control-state
          path: .control/state.json
          retention-days: 30

          components: clippy, rustfmt

fix(ci): update submodule refs to remote main tips — unblock all CI workflows

Root cause: parent repo recorded stale submodule commits no longer at branch
tips. CI uses --depth 1 which can only fetch branch-tip commits; any pinned
commit that isn't a current branch tip causes exit code 128.

Submodule refs updated to remote main:
- arcan:  3909666 (feat/arcan-jwt-auth branch) → bf46958 (main)
- haima:  040b1ed → 8497c85
- lago:   c2b293b (bro-172/lago-openapi branch) → 9ee233b (main, includes BRO-172 OpenAPI spec)

- praxis: 4a50270 → 303c608
- spaces: bc2c4cb → 051953b
- vigil:  c0a2e00 → 85e627e

Also: add branch = main to .gitmodules for spaces, vigil, praxis, nous
(these were missing the branch declaration, making --depth 1 ambiguous).
Also: add sdks/*/dist/ to .gitignore (build artifacts).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
)"
